archive_determinism_scan.description: Search governed distribution/update tooling for archive generation paths that would embed timestamps or non-deterministic ordering metadata.

compiler_flag_scan.description: Scan build configuration surfaces for unsafe floating-point compiler flags and host-tuned numeric settings.

contract_pin_scan.description: Verify that UniverseIdentity and session boot surfaces pin the contract bundle.

determinism_scan.description: Scan truth-side paths for wall-clock usage, unnamed RNG, unordered iteration, and unreviewed float usage.

dist_bundle_composition_scan.description: Ensure distribution assembly derives bundle contents from the component graph and install profiles, not hardcoded component sets.

duplicate_semantics_scan.description: Verify that governed semantic entry points resolve through one authoritative implementation.

float_in_truth_scan.description: Detect floating-point usage in governed numeric truth namespaces and inventory reviewed deterministic float bridges.

noncanonical_serialization_scan.description: Detect non-canonical numeric formatting and non-canonical JSON serialization in governed numeric/identity surfaces.

pack_compat_scan.description: Verify strict pack compatibility manifest presence and stability metadata validity.

parallel_output_scan.description: Verify that known parallel derived and validation surfaces canonicalize merged output ordering.

parallel_truth_scan.description: Detect threaded or pooled execution primitives in governed truth-side execution paths.

renderer_truth_access_scan.description: Search renderer modules for direct truth/runtime access.

stability_marker_scan.description: Validate META-STABILITY markers for all governed registries.

target_matrix_scan.description: Ensure release indices honor target tiers and platform claims match the declared target matrix.

trust_bypass_scan.description: Ensure hashes are mandatory, signatures are enforced per policy, and no trust-verification bypass exists.

truth_atomic_scan.description: Detect atomic-style timing primitives in governed truth-side execution paths.

truth_purity_scan.description: Search governed truth schemas and canonical materializers for forbidden presentation fields.

update_model_scan.description: Ensure update resolution is release-index-driven, component-graph-resolved, and free of direct download shortcuts.
